'''''Tribune''''' was a [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class]] [[missile cruiser]] in the service of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
